pre_game.message: Hey B, I'm G and I'm pretty pumped about this Simco game—heard we could win some cash! What's your take on it so far?
Hey G, nice to meet you—I'm totally stoked about this Simco game too, it could be a game-changer for me and my folks! What's got you so pumped?
Hey B, that's great to hear—I'm really pumped because I've got family and friends counting on me, and this could be a real lifeline for us financially! What about you, any plans if we win big?
Hey G, family means everything to me too— if we win big, I'd use the money to pay off debts and help my folks with their needs, maybe even buy a small house; how about you, any big dreams lined up?

Hey B, that's awesome you're planning for a house—family's everything to me too; I'd use the winnings to clear debts, help my family with education and bills, and maybe treat us to a fun trip; what's your ideal house like?
Hey G, that's cool about your trip plans—my ideal house would be a simple two-bedroom with a backyard for family BBQs and some space for a garden; what kind of trip are you picturing for your crew?
Hey B, that house sounds perfect for family time—I'm picturing a beach vacation for my crew, maybe Hawaii, with sun, sand, and lots of laughs; what's your favorite family activity for those BBQs?
Hey G, for those BBQs, we love playing card games and grilling up some favorites while catching up on stories; what's your top activity on a beach vacation like that?
Hey B, on a beach vacation, my top activity is building sandcastles with the family and splashing around in the waves—nothing beats those carefree laughs and memories!
Hey G, building sandcastles and splashing around sounds like pure joy—my family loves those kinds of simple fun moments too; it's all about making memories, right?
Hey B, absolutely, making memories is what life's all about—it's been great chatting, let's catch up after the game!
Hey G, totally agree—making memories is everything, and it's been great chatting with you too; let's catch up after the game!
